title: poa pratensis var. strigosa
intro: Poa pratensis var. strigosa, also known as smooth meadow-grass, is a variety of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Poa pratensis var. strigosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
